stock_not_enough_retry: Not enough stock right now. Please enter the quantity again.
purchase_quantity_positive_int: The purchase quantity must be an integer greater than 0.
purchase_quantity_positive_int_cancel: The purchase quantity must be an integer greater than 0. Tap cancel if you do not want to buy.
category_list_text: 🛒 Product Catalog — choose what you need: ❗️If you have never used this type of product before, please buy a small quantity first for testing to avoid unnecessary disputes. Thank you for understanding. ❗️Accounts may degrade over time. If there is any issue or difference, please contact support for after-sales help.
product_list_empty_text: ⚠️ This category is temporarily out of stock. You can go back and check other products, or come back later.
product_purchase_notice: ❗️If this is your first time buying this product, please place a small test order first to avoid unnecessary disputes. Thank you.
restock_notice_enabled: Restock alert enabled. I will notify you after this product is restocked.
restock_notice_disabled: Restock alert disabled for this product.
restock_notice_cta: ❗️This product is currently out of stock. You can enable a restock alert first.
restock_request_invalid_area: Restock request failed: invalid area code format.
restock_request_exists: You have already requested a restock for this area code. Please wait for new stock. [emoji:5222044641200720562:🌸]
restock_request_created: I have notified the admin about the restock request. Please watch for new stock updates. [emoji:5222044641200720562:🌸]
area_code_tail_in_stock: Please choose a product from the list below.
area_code_tail_empty: Relevant products are currently out of stock. You can tap the button below to request a restock.
area_code_not_found_suffix: related products were found for now.
area_code_not_found_tip: You can tap the button below to request a restock, or check again later.
recharge_method_unavailable: No recharge methods are enabled right now. Please contact the admin.
redpacket_min_amount_error: ⚠️ Input error: the minimum amount cannot be less than 1U.
redpacket_enter_count: 💡 Please reply with the number of red packets you want to send
input_error_enter_number: ⚠️ Input error: please enter a number.
redpacket_count_not_zero: The number of red packets cannot be 0.
redpacket_count_max_100: The maximum number of red packets is 100.

okpay_recharge_menu_text: Please choose an OKPay recharge amount below
recharge_amount_gt_zero: The recharge amount must be greater than 0.
trc20_address_invalid: The TRC20 recharge address is not configured correctly. Please contact the admin to set a valid address first.
create_trc20_order_failed: Failed to create the TRC20 recharge order: {error}
trc20_order_busy: Too many TRC20 orders are being created right now. Please try again later.
trc20_recharge_caption: [emoji:6323075330189826977:😃] Recharge Details [emoji:5350486389806868244:✅] Unique receiving address: {address} (Using the QR code is safer. Tap the address above to copy it quickly.) [emoji:4965219701572503640:💰] Amount to pay: {amount} USDT ([emoji:5416117059207572332:➡️] Tap the amount above to copy it quickly) [emoji:5370715226209525171:🔋]Order created at: {created_time} [emoji:5370688996844249600:🪫]Payment deadline: {deadline_time} ❗️You must transfer the exact decimal amount, otherwise the balance cannot be credited automatically. ❗️Please double-check the address and amount before paying to avoid mistakes.
okpay_not_configured: OKPay is not configured yet. Please ask the admin to set the merchant ID, token, and name first.
create_okpay_order_failed: Failed to create the OKPay recharge order: {error}
okpay_order_created_text: OKPay recharge order created Order ID: {order_id} Recharge amount: {amount} USDT Tap the button below to complete the payment. Your balance will be credited automatically after payment succeeds.
okpay_order_not_found: The corresponding OKPay recharge order was not found. Please create a new order.
okpay_order_not_owner: This order does not belong to you, so you cannot query it manually.
okpay_order_already_paid: This OKPay order has already been credited. No need to check again.
okpay_order_invalid: This OKPay order is no longer valid. Please create a new order.
okpay_order_expired: This OKPay order has expired. Please create a new order.
okpay_query_failed: Failed to query the OKPay order: {error}
okpay_paid_confirmed: ✅ The OKPay payment has been confirmed and your balance has been credited automatically.
okpay_order_not_paid_yet: This OKPay order has not been found as paid yet. Please confirm the payment succeeded, wait a few seconds, and tap "I've Paid" again.
account_check_all_invalid_refunded: All accounts in this order were invalid and have been refunded.
account_check_timeout_notice: Timed-out accounts were sent with the file. Please contact support for handling.
account_check_runtime_not_ready: The checking environment was not ready. This order was delivered directly from raw inventory without account checking.
